d5i_recommendation: Route A primary candidate after B passes
notes: Best match among reviewed public datasets for raw ADC plus radar R/A/D labels, but no native clean/interfered weak-target pairing.

d5i_recommendation: Route A secondary RAD object-detection candidate
notes: Strong RAD label reference; auto-annotation and large gt/ADC size make immediate use expensive.
Useful for RA/RD/RAD annotation design; RAD tensors are large and no clean/interfered pairing.
D5H no-pass remains binding; do not upgrade without new label evidence.
Official raw README was not revalidated in this run; keep as follow-up, not a decision anchor.
Point-cloud route may lose weak targets before evaluation, so it is weak for preservation claims.
Good 4D radar perception benchmark, but not a clean/interfered mitigation protocol.
Small 3D radar detection dataset; useful for annotation examples, not for D5 weak preservation.
Adverse-weather radar perception value, but not direct FMCW RAD weak-target preservation.

d5i_recommendation: Not suitable for D5I main protocol
notes: Useful for radar robustness/odometry, not object-level fixed-PFA weak-target evaluation.
